articles.title: Zuckerberg Admits Meta Censored Health Freedom — But the Algorithm Suppression Continues
articles.summary: Meta's fact-checking 'reform' is strategic theater, not genuine change. While Zuckerberg publicly admits bias against natural health information, the same algorithms still bury alternative medical research and wellness content. The globalist health control machine simply shifted tactics.

articles.title: Fauci's COVID Lies Finally Face Congressional Fire — But Where Are the Prosecutions?

articles.title: ImmunityBio Securities Fraud Lawsuit Exposes Cancer Treatment Data Manipulation
articles.summary: Investors are suing ImmunityBio for allegedly misleading claims about cancer immunotherapy trials. Another biotech company caught inflating efficacy data while patients and investors pay the price for fraudulent research.

articles.title: Media Hypes 'Absurd' Research While Real Science Gets Buried
articles.summary: New exposé reveals how mainstream media amplifies junk studies that sound impressive but lack substance, while legitimate research challenging pharmaceutical narratives gets ignored. The replication crisis isn't just about bad science — it's about manufactured consent.

articles.title: Quantum Biology Could Revolutionize Medicine — If Big Pharma Doesn't Kill It First
articles.summary: Scientists are discovering quantum effects drive cellular processes and may explain why alternative therapies work. This represents a paradigm shift that threatens pharmaceutical profit models built on chemical intervention rather than energy medicine.

articles.title: Medicaid Fraud Epidemic Exposes Healthcare System Corruption
articles.summary: Rampant Medicaid fraud in Minnesota and California reveals systemic corruption in government healthcare programs. While officials focus on minor prescription violations, billions in fraudulent payments flow to connected operators with political protection.

articles.title: The 'Meme Disease' — How Viral Fear Spreads Faster Than Actual Pathogens
articles.summary: Psychological contagion through media manipulation creates disease panics that cause more harm than the actual threats. The COVID hysteria playbook is being recycled for the next manufactured health crisis.

articles.summary: Analysis shows media coverage intensity has zero correlation with actual mortality risk, proving health 'crises' are manufactured for clicks and control. The same propaganda machine that drove COVID hysteria is already spinning up the next fear campaign.

articles.title: Meta's Zuckerberg Admits Censorship Bias — But Algorithm Suppression Continues

This isn't genuine reform but strategic repositioning — algorithms still crush natural health content while maintaining the illusion of openness.
